title: What happens when agents get their own computers
summary: Cursor demonstrated two new autonomous agent capabilities: agents that write, test, and validate code with video output, and cloud agents that automate PR management to merge-ready state. The system removes manual handoffs between development and shipping by using intentional checkpoints and agent-driven workflows.
